Class SeatingConfig

java.lang.Object
com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.operations.SeatingConfig
All Implemented Interfaces:
ISeatingConfig
public class SeatingConfig extends Object implements ISeatingConfig
Class which stores attributes about an Event's Seating Configuration
Version:
4.0 April 5 2025
Author:
Meer Ali, Neil Daya
